Yakumo-Sue’s Study Journey
  • 01.HTML + CSS 学习

  • 01.HTML + CSS 学习
  • 8.仿-小米官网

8.仿-小米官网

搭建项目​

创建项目文件及文件夹​

  • index.html 任何网站的首页都是这个名字

    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">

    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
        <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="ie=edge">
        <title>小米商城 - 小米9 Pro、小米MIX Alpha、Redmi Note 8, 小米电视官方网站</title>
        <!-- 标签图标 -->
        <link rel="icon" href="./favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon">
        <!-- 引入css样式 -->
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./lib/reset/reset.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/common.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="./css/index.css">
    </head>

    <body>
        <!-- 头部栏 -->
        <div class="top-nav">
            <!-- 版心 -->
            <div class="container clearfix">
                <!-- 头部栏左边部分 -->
                <div class="top-nav-left">
                    <a href="#">小米商城</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">MIUI</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">loT</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">云服务</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">金融</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">有品</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">小爱开放平台</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">企业团购</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">资质证照</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">协议规则</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">下载app</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">Select Location</a>
                </div>

                <!-- 头部栏右边部分 -->

                <!-- 购物车 -->
                <div class="topnav-right-cart">
                    <i class="iconfont-cart"></i>
                    <span>购物车</span>
                    <div>(0)</div>
                </div>

                <!-- 右侧登录 -->
                <div class="topnav-right-login">
                    <a href="#">登录</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">注册</a>
                    <span>|</span>
                    <a href="#">消息通知</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 搜索栏 -->
        <div class="search-nav">
            <!-- 版心 -->
            <div class="container clearfix">
                <!-- 左边logo -->
                <div class="search-nav-logo">
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/mi-logo.png">
                    </a>
                </div>
                <!-- 中间列表 -->

                <div class="search-nav-center">
                    <div class="searchnav-category"></div>
                    <a href="#"><span>小米手机</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>Redmi 红米</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>电视</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>笔记本</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>家电</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>路由器</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>智能硬件</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>服务</span></a>
                    <a href="#"><span>社区</span></a>
                </div>


                <!-- 右侧搜索框 -->
                <div class="searchnav-right-input">
                    <input type="text">

                    <a href="#">小米9 Pro 5G</a>
                    <a href="#">Redmi Note 8</a>
                </div>
                <div class="searchnav-right-button">
                    <img src="./img/search_icon.png">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 轮播图 -->
        <div class="carousel">
            <!-- 版心 -->
            <div class="container clearfix">
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/mi-phone.jpg" width="1226px" height="460px">
                        </a>
                    </li>
                </ul>

                <!-- 商品类型列表 -->
                <div class="carousel-left-title">
                    <a href="#">手机 电话卡 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">电视 盒子 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">笔记本 平板 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">家电 插线板 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">出行 穿戴 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">智能 路由器 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">电源 配件 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">健康 儿童 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">耳机 音箱 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                    <a href="#">生活 箱包 <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i></a>
                </div>

                <!-- 左右滑动 -->
                <a href="#" class="carousel-left iconfont-arrow-left-big-thin"></a>
                <a href="#" class="carousel-right iconfont-arrow-right-big-thin"></a>

                <ol>
                    <li></li>
                    <li></li>
                    <li></li>
                    <li></li>
                    <li></li>
                </ol>
            </div>
        </div>


        <!-- 优惠活动 -->
        <div class="discount">
            <div class="container clearfix">
                <!-- 服务 -->
                <div class="discount-server">

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_1.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>小米秒杀</span>
                        </a>
                        <div></div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_2.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>企业团购</span>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_3.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>F码通道</span>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_4.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>米粉卡</span>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_5.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>以旧换新</span>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <div class="discount-server-title">
                        <div class="discount-server-top"></div>
                        <div class="discount-server-left"></div>
                        <a href="#">
                            <img src="./img/discount_item_6.png" width="24px" height="24px" alt="">
                            <span>话费充值</span>
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>


                <!-- 商品优惠 -->
                <a href="#" class="discount-goods-sell-one">
                    <img src="./upload/discount_1.jpg" alt="">
                </a>

                <a href="#" class="discount-goods-sell-two">
                    <img src="./upload/discount_2.jpg" alt="">
                </a>

                <a href="#" class="discount-goods-sell-two">
                    <img src="./upload/discount_3.jpg" alt="">
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>



        <!-- 商品展示 -->
        <div class="goods">
            <div class="container clearfix">


                <div class="goods-category">

                    <div class="goods-category-font">
                        小米闪购
                    </div>
                    <div class="goods-category-button">
                        <span class="iconfont-arrow-left-big"></span>
                        <span class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></span>
                    </div>
                </div>


                <div class="goods-sellkill">
                    <div class="goods-sellkill-time">
                        <s>14:00</s><span>场</span>
                    </div>

                    <img src="./img/flash-content-seckill.png" alt="">

                    <div class="goods-sellkill-lasttime">距离结束还有</div>

                    <div class="goods-sellkill-hms">
                        <span>03</span><small>:</small>

                        <span>29</span><small>:</small>

                        <span>09</span>
                    </div>
                </div>


                <div class="product-title">
                    <ul>
                        <li class="product-title-li">
                            <div class="title-color-one"></div>
                            <a href="#" class="content">
                                <img src="./upload/1.png" class="clearfix" alt="">
                                <h3>米家电水壶 白色</h3>
                                <div>一杯水,是一家人的安心</div>
                                <span>49.5元 <del>99元</del></span>
                            </a>
                            <div class="flag">5折</div>
                        </li>
                        <li class="product-title-li">
                            <div class="title-color-two"></div>
                            <a href="#" class="content">
                                <img src="./upload/2.jpg" class="clearfix" alt="">
                                <h3>贝医生巴氏牙刷(单支装) ...</h3>
                                <div>对新界苛刻,是对健康呵护</div>
                                <span>1元 <del>9.9元</del></span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="product-title-li">
                            <div class="title-color-three"></div>
                            <a href="#" class="content">
                                <img src="./upload/3.jpg" class="clearfix" alt="">
                                <h3>净化器滤芯 通用版</h3>
                                <div>3层高效净化悬浮物</div>
                                <span>74.5元 <del>149元</del></span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        <li>
                            <div class="title-color-four"></div>
                            <a href="#" class="content">
                                <img src="./upload/4.webp" class="clearfix" alt="">
                                <h3>最生活毛巾.Air(10条装) ...</h3>
                                <div>给生活一条好毛巾</div>
                                <span>99元 <del>169元</del></span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                </div>


                <!-- 手机长图 -->
                <div class="phone-center-img">
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./upload/list-2.webp" alt="">
                    </a>
                </div>


                <!-- 手机 -->
                <div class="phone-center-nav">
                    <!--手机 标题 -->
                    <div class="title">
                        <h2>手机</h2>
                        <a href="#">
                            <h3>查看全部</h3>
                            <i class="iconfont-arrow-right-big"></i>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <!--手机 列表 -->
                    <div class="phone-list">
                        <!--手机 列表左 长图 -->
                        <a class="phone-left-bigimg">
                            <img src="./upload/phone-long-img.webp" alt="">
                        </a>
                        <!--手机 列表右 手机展示 -->
                        <div class="phone-right-list">
                            <ul class="clearfix">
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-1.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">小米CC9 Pro</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">1亿像素 五摄四闪</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">2799元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-2.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">小米9 Pro 5G</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">5G双卡全网通, 晓龙855Plus</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">3699元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-3.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi 8</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">5000mAh超长续航</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">749元起<del class="phone-before-price">799元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-4.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi 8A</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">5000mAh超长续航</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">699元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-5.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi Note 8 Pro</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">6400万全场景四摄</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">1299元起<del class="phone-before-price">1399元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-6.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi Note 8</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">千元4800万四摄</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">999元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-7.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi K20 Pro 尊享版</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">晓龙855 Plus, 弹出全面屏</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">2699元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li>
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="phone-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/phone-8.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="phone-title">Redmi Note 7</h3>
                                        <p class="phone-desc">4800万拍照千元机</p>
                                        <p class="phone-price">1099元起</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>


                <!-- 小米电视长图 -->
                <div class="TV-center-img">
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./upload/mi-TV.webp" alt="">
                    </a>
                </div>


                <!-- 家电 -->
                <div class="household-center-nav">
                    <!--家电 标题 -->
                    <div class="title">
                        <h2>家电</h2>
                        <ul class="title-small">
                            <li>热门</li>
                            <li>电视影音</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                    <!-- 家电 列表 -->
                    <div class="household-list">
                        <!-- 家电 列表左  图片 -->
                        <ul class="household-left-imgs">
                            <li>
                                <a href="#">
                                    <img src="./upload/mi-waterclean.webp" alt="">
                                </a>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <a>
                                    <img src="./upload/mi-cleanrobot.webp" alt="">
                                </a>
                            </li>
                        </ul>


                        <!--家电 列表右 家电展示 -->
                        <div class="household-right-list">
                            <ul class="clearfix">
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-1.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">米家互联网空调C1 (一级能效)</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">变频节能省电, 自清洁</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">2599元<del class="household-before-price">2799元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-2.jpg" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">米家空调</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">出众静音, 快速制冷热</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">1699元<del class="household-before-price">1799元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-3.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">米家互联网洗烘一体机 Pro 10kg</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">智能洗烘, 省心省力</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">2999元</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-4.jpg" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">小米电视4A 32英寸</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">人工智能系统, 高清液晶屏</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">699元<del class="household-before-price">799元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-5.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">Redmi全自动波轮洗衣机 1A 8kg</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">一键操作, 父母都爱用</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">799元</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-6.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">小米全面屏电视E55A</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">全面屏设计, 人工智能语音</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">1799元</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-7.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title">15.6" 四核i7 16G 独显 512G</h3>
                                        <p class="household-desc">全面均衡的国门轻薄本</p>
                                        <p class="household-price">4699元<del class="household-before-price">4899元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-small">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-img-s">
                                            <img src="./upload/household-8.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="household-title-s">Air 13.3" 2019款</h3>
                                        <p class="household-price-s">4499<span class="household-font-s">元起</span></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-small">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="household-descprition-s">
                                            浏览更多
                                            <span>热门</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <i class="iconfont-circle-arrow-right"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>

                    </div>
                </div>


                <!-- 小米智能门锁长图 -->
                <div class="lock-center-img">
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./upload/mi-lock.webp" alt="">
                    </a>
                </div>


                <!-- 智能 -->
                <div class="capacity-center-nav">
                    <!--智能 标题 -->
                    <div class="title">
                        <h2>智能</h2>
                        <ul class="title-long">
                            <li>热门</li>
                            <li>安防</li>
                            <li>出行</li>
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                    <!-- 智能 列表 -->
                    <div class="capacity-list">
                        <!-- 智能 列表左  图片 -->
                        <ul class="capacity-left-imgs">
                            <li>
                                <a href="#">
                                    <img src="./upload/mi-vidicon.webp" alt="">
                                </a>
                            </li>
                            <li>
                                <a>
                                    <img src="./upload/mi-scooter.webp" alt="">
                                </a>
                            </li>
                        </ul>


                        <!--智能 列表右 家电展示 -->
                        <div class="capacity-right-list">
                            <ul class="clearfix">
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="capacity-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/capacity-1.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="capacity-title">小米 [小爱老师]</h3>
                                        <p class="capacity-desc">口袋里的英语外教</p>
                                        <p class="capacity-price">499元</p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="capacity-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/capacity-2.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="capacity-title">小米米家智能门锁 推拉式</h3>
                                        <p class="capacity-desc">一步推拉, 高端智能门锁</p>
                                        <p class="capacity-price">1499元<del class="capacity-before-price">1699元</del></p>
                                    </a>
                                </li>
                                <li class="list-big">
                                    <a href="#">
                                        <div class="capacity-img">
                                            <img src="./upload/capacity-3.webp" alt="">
                                        </div>
                                        <h3 class="capacity-title">小米小爱音箱 Play</h3>

        <!-- 售后 -->

            <!-- 版心 -->

                <!-- 售后板块上 -->

                            <a href="#">

                            </a>

                        <li class="list-last">

                            <a href="#">官方微信</a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="server-li-list">
                            <a href="#">联系我们</a>
                        </li>
                    </ul>

                    <ul>
                        <li class="server-li-title">
                            特色服务
                        </li>
                        <li class="server-li-list">
                            <a href="#">F 码通道</a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="server-li-list">
                            <a href="#">礼物码</a>
                        </li>
                        <li class="server-li-list">
                            <a href="#">防伪查询</a>
                        </li>
                    </ul>


                    <div class="server-telephone">
                        <h2 class="phone-number">400-100-5678</h2>
                        <p>
                            周一至周日 8:00-18:00<br>
                            (仅收市话费)
                        </p>
                        <a href="#">
                            <i class="iconfont-message2"></i>
                            人工客服
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>


        <!-- 版权所有 -->
        <div class="copyright">
            <div class="container clearfix">
                <!-- 小米logo -->
                <div class="mi-logo">
                    <img src="./img/mi-logo.png">
                </div>
                <div class="copyright-info">
                    <p class="project-title">
                        <a href="#">小米商城</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">MIUI</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">米家</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">米聊</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">多看</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">游戏</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">路由器</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">米粉卡</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">政企服务</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">小米天猫店</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">小米集团隐私政策</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">小米公司儿童信息保护规则</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">小米商城隐私政策</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">小米商城用户协议</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">问题反馈</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">廉正举报</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">诚信合规</a>
                        <span>|</span>
                        <a href="#">Select Location</a>
                    </p>

                    <p class="note-title">
                        &copy;
                        <a href="#">mi.com</a>
                        京ICP证110507号
                        <a href="#">京ICP备10046444号 </a>
                        <a href="#">京公网安备11010802929134号 </a>
                        <a href="#">京网文[2017]1530-131号</a>

                        <a href="#">&nbsp;(京) 网械平台备字 (2018) 第00005号</a>
                        <a href="#"> 互联网药品信息服务资格证(京) -非经营性-2014-0090</a>
                        <a href="#"> 营业执照</a>
                        <a href="#"> 医疗器械公告</a>
                        <br>
                        <a href="#">增值电信业务许可证</a>
                        网络视频经营备案 (京) 【2018】 WLSPJYBAHF-12
                        <a href="#"> 食品经营许可证</a>

                        违法和不良信息举报电话: 185-0130-1238
                        <a href="#"> 知识产权侵权投诉</a>
                        本网站所列数据, 除特殊说明, 所有数据均出自我司实验室测试
                    </p>
                </div>

                <div class="copyright-imgs">
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/truste-1.png" alt="">
                    </a>
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/truste-2.png" alt="">
                    </a>
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/truste-3.png" alt="">
                    </a>
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/truste-4.png" alt="">
                    </a>
                    <a href="#">
                        <img src="./img/truste-5.png" alt="">
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="mi-comment">
                探索黑科技, 小米为发烧为生!
            </div>
        </div>
    </body>

    </html>

  • css文件夹

    • index.css 首页样式

      body {
          overflow: scroll;
      }

      /* 头部栏 */
      .top-nav {
          width: 100%;
          height: 40px;
          background-color: #333333;

      }


      /* 头部栏左边部分 */
      .top-nav-left {
          float: left;
          width: 719px;
          height: 40px;
      }

      .top-nav-left a {
          width: 48px;
          height: 40px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          font-size: 12px;
          line-height: 41px;
      }

      .top-nav-left span {
          width: 3.24px;
          height: 16px;
          margin: 0px 3.8px;
          color: #3e423b;
      }

      .top-nav-left a:hover {
          color: #ffffff;
      }


      /* 头部栏右边部分 */
      .topnav-right-cart {
          float: right;
          width: 120px;
          height: 40px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          text-align: center;
          line-height: 40px;

          background-color: #424242;
      }

      .topnav-right-cart:hover {
          transition: all 0.1s;
          color: #ff6700;
          background-color: #ffffff;
      }

      .topnav-right-cart:hover div {
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .topnav-right-cart div {
          float: right;
          position: relative;
          left: -26px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
      }


      .topnav-right-cart i {
          position: relative;
          left: -8px;
          font-size: 20px;
      }


      .topnav-right-cart span {
          position: relative;
          top: -3px;
          right: 8px;
      }


      .topnav-right-login {
          float: right;
          width: 142px;
          height: 40px;
          margin-right: 10px;
      }


      .topnav-right-login a {
          width: 48px;
          height: 40px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          font-size: 12px;
          line-height: 41px;
      }

      .topnav-right-login a:hover {
          color: #ffffff;
      }


      .topnav-right-login span {
          width: 3.24px;
          height: 16px;
          margin: 0px 2.3px;
          color: #3e423b;
      }


      /* 搜索栏 */
      .search-nav {
          width: 100%;
          height: 100px;
      }


      .search-nav-logo {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          top: 23px;
          width: 55px;
          height: 55px;
          background-color: #ff6700;
      }

      .search-nav-logo a {
          width: 49px;
          height: 49px;
          padding-left: 3px;
      }


      .search-nav-logo img {
          padding-top: 3px;
      }



      .search-nav-center {
          float: left;
          width: 800px;
          height: 88px;
          padding-top: 12px;
          padding-left: 30px;
      }

      .searchnav-category {
          float: left;
          width: 127px;
          height: 88px;
          padding-right: 15px;
      }


      .search-nav-center a {
          position: relative;
          top: 29px;
          width: 64px;
          height: 24px;
          padding: 26px 10px 38px 10px;
      }

      .search-nav-center a:hover {
          transition: all 0.3s;
          color: #ff6700;
      }


      .search-nav-center span {
          font-size: 16px;
      }


      .searchnav-right-input {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 45px;
          width: 223px;
          height: 50px;
          margin-top: 25px;
      }


      .searchnav-right-input input {
          width: 223px;
          height: 48px;
          border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
          padding: 0px 10px;
      }


      .searchnav-right-input a {

          float: left;
          position: relative;
          bottom: 33px;
          left: 52px;
          width: 73.6px;
          height: 17.6px;
          line-height: 17.6px;
          color: #757575;
          margin-left: 5px;
          padding: 0px 5px;
          margin-right: 5px;
          background-color: #eeeeee;
      }


      .searchnav-right-input a:hover {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          color: #ffffff;
          background-color: #ff6700;
      }


      .searchnav-right-button {
          float: right;
          width: 38px;
          height: 46px;
          padding: 1px 6px;
          margin-top: 25px;
          border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;

          text-align: center;
      }


      .searchnav-right-button:hover {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          background-color: #ff6700;
      }


      .searchnav-right-button img {
          box-sizing: border-box;
          margin-top: 14px;
      }


      /* 轮播图 */
      .carousel {
          position: relative;
          height: 460px;
      }


      .carousel ol {
          float: right;
          position: absolute;
          bottom: 25px;
          right: 15px;
          width: 100px;
          height: 20px;
      }

      .carousel ol li {
          float: left;
          width: 6px;
          height: 7px;
          margin-right: 10px;
          background-color: #8d9195;
          border: 2px solid #b2b5b8;
          border-radius: 50%;
      }

      .carousel ol li:hover {
          background-color: #fff;
          border: 2px solid #8d9195;
      }



      .carousel-left-title {
          float: left;
          position: absolute;
          bottom: 3px;
          width: 234px;
          height: 421px;
          padding: 20px 0;
          background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36);
      }


      .carousel-left-title a {
          float: left;
          width: 182px;
          height: 42px;
          font-size: 14px;
          color: #fff;
          font-weight: bold;
          padding-left: 28px;
          padding-right: 24px;
          line-height: 42px;
      }

      .carousel-left-title a:hover {
          background-color: #ff6700;
      }


      .carousel-left-title i {
          float: right;
          font-size: 18px;
          font-weight: initial;
      }

      .carousel-left {
          float: left;
          position: absolute;
          top: 40%;
          left: 19.1%;
          width: 40px;
          height: 70px;
          font-size: 40px;
          color: #ccd7d9;
          font-weight: bolder;
          line-height: 70px;
          background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }


      .carousel-left:hover {
          color: #fff;
          background-color: rgba(0, 7, 10, 0.55);
      }



      .carousel-right {
          float: right;
          position: absolute;
          top: 40%;
          left: 96.7%;
          width: 40px;
          height: 70px;
          font-size: 40px;
          color: #ccd7d9;
          font-weight: bolder;
          line-height: 70px;
          background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      }


      .carousel-right:hover {
          color: #fff;
          background-color: rgba(0, 7, 10, 0.55);
      }


      /* 优惠活动 */
      .discount {
          height: 170px;
          margin: 14px 0 26px;
      }

      .discount-server {
          float: left;
          width: 228px;
          height: 164px;
          border: 3px solid #5f5750;
      }

      .discount-server-title {
          float: left;
          width: 74px;
          height: 80px;
          padding-right: 2px;
          padding-bottom: 3px;
          background-color: #5f5750;
      }

      .discount-server-top {
          float: right;
          position: relative;
          right: 3px;
          width: 64px;
          height: 1px;
          background-color: #665e57;
      }


      .discount-server-left {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          top: 9px;
          width: 1px;
          height: 70px;
          background-color: #665e57;
      }


      .discount-server-left a {
          width: 70px;
          height: 45.6px;
          margin-top: 18px;
          text-align: center;
          opacity: 0.5;
      }

      .discount-server-left a:hover {
          opacity: 1;
      }


      .discount-server-title:hover span {
          color: #fff;
      }


      .discount-server-title img {
          margin: 18px 23px 4px;
      }

      .discount-server-title span {
          color: #ceccca;
          font-size: 12px;
          font-weight: 600px;
          margin-left: 15px;
      }


      .discount-goods-sell-one {
          float: left;
          width: 316px;
          height: 170px;
          margin-left: 14px;
      }

      .discount-goods-sell-one:hover {
          box-shadow: 0px 0px 17px #d3c9c9;
      }


      .discount-goods-sell-two {
          float: left;
          width: 316px;
          height: 170px;
          margin-left: 15px;
      }

      .discount-goods-sell-two:hover {
          box-shadow: 0px 0px 17px #d3c9c9;
      }


      .discount-goods-sell-one img {
          width: 316px;
          height: 170px;
      }


      .discount-goods-sell-two img {
          width: 316px;
          height: 170px;
      }


      /* 商品展示 */
      .goods {
          width: 100%px;
          height: 6028px;
          background-color: #f5f5f5;
      }

      .goods-category {
          height: 57.6px;
      }


      .goods-category-font {
          float: left;
          font-size: 22px;
          color: #333333;
          line-height: 57.6px;
      }


      .goods-category-button {
          float: right;
      }


      .goods-category-button span {
          float: left;
          width: 24px;
          height: 16px;
          padding: 3px 5px;
          margin-top: 22px;
          border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
          font-size: 16px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #b2b0b0;
      }

      .goods-category-button span:hover {
          transition: all 0.8s;
          color: #ff6700;
      }


      .goods-sellkill {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
          background-color: #f1eded;
          border-top: 1px solid #e53935;
          padding-top: 39px;
          text-align: center;
      }

      .goods-sellkill-time {
          height: 31.2px;
          padding-top: 15px;
      }

      .goods-sellkill-time s {
          font-size: 21px;
          color: #ef3a3b;
      }

      .goods-sellkill-time span {
          font-size: 21px;
          color: #ef3a3b;
      }

      .goods-sellkill img {
          width: 34px;
          height: 53px;
          padding: 25px 0;
      }


      .goods-sellkill-lasttime {
          height: 23.4px;
          color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
          font-size: 15px;
      }


      .goods-sellkill-hms {
          width: 168px;
          height: 46px;
          padding: 28px 33px 0;
      }


      .goods-sellkill-hms small {
          float: left;
          width: 15px;
          height: 46px;
          line-height: 46px;
          color: #605751;
          font-size: 28px;
      }

      .goods-sellkill-hms span {
          float: left;
          width: 46px;
          height: 46px;
          line-height: 46px;
          background-color: #605751;
          color: #fff;
          font-size: 24px;
      }


      .product-title {
          float: left;
          width: 978px;
          height: 340px;
          padding-left: 14px;
      }

      .product-title ul {
          float: left;
      }


      .product-title-li {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 340px;
          margin-right: 14px;
          background-color: #fff;
      }

      .title-color-one {
          width: 234px;
          height: 1px;
          background-color: #fdc152;
      }

      .title-color-two {
          width: 234px;
          height: 1px;
          background-color: #a3d27c;
      }

      .title-color-three {
          width: 234px;
          height: 1px;
          background-color: #6ab6f4;
      }

      .title-color-four {
          width: 234px;
          height: 1px;
          background-color: #ea6d6a;
      }


      .product-title-li:hover {
          transition: all 1s;
          box-shadow: 0px 0px 6px #d3c9c9;
      }



      .product-title ul li:last-child {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 340px;
          border-top: 1px solid #00c0a5;
          background-color: #fff;
      }

      .product-title ul li:last-child:hover {
          transition: all 1s;
          box-shadow: 0px 0px 6px #d3c9c9;
      }


      .product-title .content {
          display: block;
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
          padding-top: 39px;

      }

      .product-title .content img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 165px;
          margin: 0 37px 22px;
      }


      .content h3 {
          width: 194px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 20px 3px;
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: initial;
          text-align: center;
          color: rgba(0, 0, 0);
      }

      .content div {
          width: 194px;
          height: 18px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #adadad;
          font-size: 12px;
          margin: 0 20px 12px;
      }

      .content span {
          position: relative;
          left: 79px;
          font-size: 14px;
          color: #fa6509;
      }

      .content del {
          padding-left: 2px;
          font-size: 14px;
          color: #b1b1b1;
          text-decoration: line-through;
      }

      .flag {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          bottom: 339px;
          left: 83px;
          width: 64px;
          height: 20px;
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #fff;
          background-color: #e13834;
          line-height: 20px;
          text-align: center;
      }


      /* 手机长图 */
      .phone-center-img {
          float: left;
          height: 120px;
          margin: 22px 0;
      }


      .phone-center-img img {
          height: 120px;
      }



      /* 手机 */

      /* 手机标题 */
      .phone-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 686px;
      }


      .title {
          height: 58px;
      }


      .title h2 {
          float: left;
          width: 100px;
          font-size: 22px;
          font-weight: normal;
          line-height: 58px;
      }

      .title a {
          float: right;
          width: 92px;
          height: 58px;
          line-height: 58px;
      }

      .title a:hover h3 {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .title a:hover i {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          background-color: #ff6700;
      }


      .title a h3 {
          float: left;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: inherit;
      }

      .title a i {
          float: left;
          width: 12px;
          height: 12px;
          padding: 4px;
          margin-top: 19px;
          margin-left: 8px;
          border-radius: 16px;
          color: #fff;
          line-height: 12px;
          background-color: #b0b0b0;
      }

      /* 手机 列表 */
      .phone-list {
          height: 628px;
      }


      /* 手机 列表左 长图 */
      .phone-left-bigimg {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 628px;
          transition: all 0.3s;
      }


      .phone-left-bigimg:hover {
          
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .phone-left-bigimg img {
          width: 234px;
          height: 614px;
      }


      /* 手机 列表右 手机展示 */
      .phone-right-list {
          float: left;
          width: 978px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .phone-right-list ul {
          width: 992px;
          height: 614px;
      }

      .phone-right-list ul li {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 260px;
          padding: 20px 0;
          margin-left: 14px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          background-color: #fff;
      }

      .phone-right-list ul li:hover {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .phone-img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
          margin: 0 37px 18px;
      }


      .phone-img img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
      }

      .phone-title {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 2px;
          text-align: center;
          color: black;
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: inherit;
      }

      .phone-desc {
          width: 214px;
          height: 18px;
          margin: 0 10px 10px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #b0b7cb;
          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .phone-price {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 14px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #ff6700;
          font-size: 14px;
      }


      .phone-before-price {
          margin-left: 7px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          font-size: 14px;
          text-decoration: line-through;
      }



      /* 小米电视长图 */
      .TV-center-img {
          float: left;
          height: 120px;
          margin: 22px 0;
      }


      .TV-center-img img {
          height: 120px;
      }


      /* 家电 */
      /* 家电标题 */
      .household-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 686px;
      }

      .title-small {
          float: right;
          width: 156px;
          height: 26px;
          padding-top: 16px;
      }

      .title-small li {
          float: left;
          height: 24px;
          font-size: 16px;
          margin-left: 30px;
      }

      .title-small li:first-child {
          color: #ff6700;
          border-bottom: 2px solid #ff6700;
      }


      /* 家电 列表 */
      /* 家电 列表左  图片 */
      .household-list {
          height: 628px;
      }

      .household-left-imgs {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .household-left-imgs li {
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          transition: all 0.3s;
      }

      .household-left-imgs li:hover {
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .household-left-imgs li img {
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
      }

      /* 家电 列表右 家电展示 */
      .household-right-list {
          float: left;
          width: 978px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .household-right-list ul {
          width: 992px;
          height: 614px;
      }

      .list-big {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 260px;
          padding: 20px 0;
          margin-left: 14px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          background-color: #fff;
      }

      .list-small {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 93px;
          padding-top: 50px;
          margin-left: 14px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          background-color: #fff;
          transition: all 0.3s;
      }


      .list-small:hover {
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .list-big:hover {
          transition: all 0.3m;
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .household-img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
          margin: 0 37px 18px;
      }


      .household-img img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
      }

      .household-title {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 2px;
          text-align: center;
          color: black;
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: inherit;
      }

      .household-desc {
          width: 214px;
          height: 18px;
          margin: 0 10px 10px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #b0b7cb;
          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .household-price {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 14px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #ff6700;
          font-size: 14px;
      }


      .household-before-price {
          margin-left: 7px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          font-size: 14px;
          text-decoration: line-through;
      }


      .household-img-s {
          float: right;
          position: relative;
          bottom: 14px;
          right: 25px;
          width: 80px;
          height: 80px;
      }

      .household-img-s img {
          width: 80px;
          height: 80px;
      }

      .household-title-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 30px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 41.6px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: initial;
          color: black;
      }

      .household-price-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 30px;
          width: 80px;
          height: 20.8px;
          font-size: 15px;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .household-price-s span {
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .household-desc-s {
          width: 94px;
          height: 17.6px;
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #757575;
      }


      .household-descprition-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 25px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 44px;
          font-size: 18px;
          color: black;
      }

      .household-descprition-s span {
          position: relative;
          left: -5px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 17.2px;
          font-size: 12px;
          margin-left: 6px;
          color: #757575;
      }


      .list-small i {
          position: relative;
          top: -10px;
          right: 35px;
          float: right;
          font-size: 48px;
          color: #ff6700;
      }



      /* 小米智能门锁长图 */
      .lock-center-img {
          float: left;
          height: 120px;
          margin: 22px 0;
      }


      .lock-center-img img {
          height: 120px;
      }


      /* 智能 */
      /* 智能标题 */
      .capacity-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 686px;
      }

      .title-long {
          float: right;
          width: 186px;
          height: 26px;
          padding-top: 16px;
      }

      .title-long li {
          float: left;
          height: 24px;
          font-size: 16px;
          margin-left: 30px;
      }

      .title-long li:first-child {
          color: #ff6700;
          border-bottom: 2px solid #ff6700;
      }




      /* 智能 列表 */
      /* 智能 列表左  图片 */
      .capacity-list {
          height: 628px;
      }

      .capacity-left-imgs {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .capacity-left-imgs li {
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          transition: all 0.3s;
      }

      .capacity-left-imgs li:hover {
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .capacity-left-imgs li img {
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
      }

      /* 智能 列表右 智能展示 */

          float: left;
          width: 978px;
          height: 628px;
      }

          width: 992px;
          height: 614px;
      }

          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
          margin: 0 37px 18px;
      }


      .capacity-img img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
      }

      .capacity-title {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 2px;
          text-align: center;
          color: black;

          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .capacity-price {

      }


      .capacity-before-price {

      /* 搭配 */
      /* 搭配 标题 */
      .match-center-nav {
          float: left;

          height: 686px;

      /* 配件 */
      /* 配件标题 */
      .mountings-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 686px;
      }

      .title-long-three {

      }

      .childwatch-center-img img {
          height: 120px;
      }



      /* 周边 */
      /* 周边 标题 */
      .rim-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 686px;
      }


      /* 周边 列表 */
      /* 周边 列表左  图片 */
      .rim-list {
          height: 628px;
      }

      .rim-left-imgs {
          float: left;
          width: 234px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .rim-left-imgs li {
          position: relative;
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
          transition: all 0.3s;
      }

      .rim-left-imgs li:hover {
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .rim-left-imgs li img {
          width: 234px;
          height: 300px;
      }

      /* 周边 列表右 家电展示 */
      .rim-right-list {
          float: left;
          width: 978px;
          height: 628px;
      }


      .rim-right-list ul {
          width: 992px;
          height: 614px;
      }

      .rim-img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
          margin: 0 37px 18px;
      }


      .rim-img img {
          width: 160px;
          height: 160px;
      }

      .rim-title {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 2px;
          text-align: center;
          color: black;
          font-size: 14px;
          font-weight: inherit;
      }

      .rim-desc {
          width: 214px;
          height: 18px;
          margin: 0 10px 10px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #b0b7cb;
          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .rim-price {
          width: 214px;
          height: 21px;
          margin: 0 10px 14px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #ff6700;
          font-size: 14px;
      }


      .rim-before-price {
          margin-left: 7px;
          color: #b0b0b0;
          font-size: 14px;
          text-decoration: line-through;
      }


      .rim-img-s {
          float: right;
          position: relative;
          bottom: 14px;
          right: 25px;
          width: 80px;
          height: 80px;
      }

      .rim-img-s img {
          width: 80px;
          height: 80px;
      }

      .rim-title-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 30px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 41.6px;
          font-size: 16px;
          font-weight: initial;
          color: black;
      }

      .rim-price-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 30px;
          width: 80px;
          height: 20.8px;
          font-size: 15px;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .rim-price-s span {
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .rim-desc-s {
          width: 94px;
          height: 17.6px;
          font-size: 12px;
          color: #757575;
      }


      .rim-descprition-s {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          left: 25px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 44px;
          font-size: 18px;
          color: black;
      }

      .rim-descprition-s span {
          position: relative;
          left: -5px;
          width: 94px;
          height: 17.2px;
          font-size: 12px;
          margin-left: 6px;
          color: #757575;
      }


      /* 小米中性笔长图 */
      .pen-center-img {
          float: left;
          height: 120px;
          margin: 22px 0;
      }

      .pen-center-img img {
          height: 120px;
      }



      /* 视频 */
      /* 视频标题 */
      .video-center-nav {
          float: left;
          width: 1226px;
          height: 360px;
      }

      /* 视频列表 */
      .video-list {
          float: left;
          width: 1240px;
          height: 285px;
      }

      .video-list li {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          width: 296px;
          height: 285px;
          background-color: #fff;
      }

      .video-list-fist {
          margin-bottom: 14px;
      }

      .video-list-last {
          margin-left: 14px;
          margin-bottom: 14px;
      }


      .video-list li div {
          width: 296px;
          height: 180px;
          margin-bottom: 28px;
      }

      .video-list li img {
          width: 296px;
          height: 180px;
      }

      .video-list li span {
          float: left;
          position: relative;
          bottom: 39px;
          left: 22px;
          width: 32px;
          height: 20px;
          border: 2px solid #fff;
          border-radius: 39%;
      }

      .video-list li i {
          font-size: 29px;
          color: #fff;
          line-height: 20px;
          margin-left: 2px;
      }


      .video-list li h3 {
          width: 268px;
          height: 20.8px;
          margin: 0 14px 6px;
          font-size: 14px;
          text-align: center;
          line-height: 20px;
          font-weight: lighter;
      }


      .video-list li:hover {
          transition: all 0.3s;
          bottom: 2px;
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px #d4cdcd;
      }


      .video-list li:hover span {
          background-color: #ff6700;
          border: 2px solid #ff6700;
      }

      /* 售后 */
      .server {
          float: left;
          width: 100%;
          height: 272px;
      }

      /* 售后板块上 */
      .server-up {
          float: left;
          height: 25px;
          padding: 27px 0;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
      }

      .server-up ul {
          width: 1226px;
          height: 25px;
      }

      .server-up li {
          float: left;
          width: 239px;
          text-align: center;
      }


      .list-last {
          border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
      }

      .server-up li a {
          font-size: 16px;
          color: #616161;
      }

      .server-up li:hover a {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .server-up li span {
          position: relative;
          bottom: 5px;
      }

      .server-up li i {
          font-size: 24px;
      }


      /* 售后板块下 */
      .server-under {
          float: left;
          height: 112px;
          padding: 40px 0;
      }

      .server-under ul {
          float: left;
          width: 160px;
          height: 112px;
      }

      .server-li-title {
          width: 160px;
          height: 16.8px;
          margin-bottom: 26px;
          font-size: 14px;
      }

      .server-li-list {
          width: 160px;
          height: 17.6px;
          margin-top: 10px;
          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .server-li-list a {
          color: #757575;
      }

      .server-li-list a:hover {
          transition: all 0.5s;
          color: #ff6700;
      }

      .server-telephone {
          float: left;
          width: 251px;
          height: 112px;
          border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
      }

      .phone-number {
          float: left;
          width: 251px;
          height: 21.6px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #ff6700;
          font-size: 22px;
          font-weight: inherit;
          margin-bottom: 10px;

      }

      .server-telephone p {
          float: left;
          width: 251px;
          height: 35.2px;
          margin-bottom: 16px;
          text-align: center;
          color: #616161;
      }

      .server-telephone a {
          position: relative;
          left: 71px;
          display: inline-block;
          width: 118px;
          height: 28px;
          border: 1px solid #ff6700;
          text-align: center;
          line-height: 28px;
          color: #ff6700;
          font-size: 12px;
      }

      .server-telephone a:hover {
          transition: all 0.4s;
          background-color: #ff6700;
          color: #fff;
      }


      /* 版权所有 */
      .copyright {
          float: left;
          width: 100%;
          height: 170px;
          padding: 30px 0;
          background-color: #fafafa;
      }


      .mi-logo {
          float: left;
          width: 57px;
          height: 57px;
          background-color: #ff6700;
          margin-right: 10px;
      }

      .mi-logo img {
          width: 57px;
          height: 57px;
      }

      .copyright-info {
          width: 1159px;
          height: 85px;
          padding-left: 67px;
      }

      .project-title {
          margin: 1px 0 3px;
      }

      .project-title a {
          color: #757575;
      }

      .project-title a:hover {
          color: #fe6700;
      }

      .project-title span {
          color: #757575;
      }

      .note-title {
          color: #b0b0b0;
      }

      .note-title a {
          color: #b0b0b0;
      }

      .note-title a:hover {
          color: #fe6700;
      }

      .copyright-imgs {
          float: left;
          width: 1159px;
          height: 28px;
          margin-top: 4px;
          padding-left: 67px;
      }

      .copyright-imgs img:first-child {
          width: 83px;
          height: 28px;
      }

      .mi-comment{
          float: left;
          width: 267px;
          height: 19px;
          margin: 30px 626px 0;
          font-size: 17px;
          color: #d9d9d9;

      }

    • common.css 公共样式 

      /* 清除浮动 */
      .clearfix:before,
      .clearfix:after {
        content: "";
        display: table;
      }

      .clearfix:after {
        clear: both;
      }

      .clearfix {
        *zoom: 1;
      }

      /* 版心样式 */
      .container {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0 auto;
        width: 1226px;
      }


      /* 文字图标 */
      @font-face {
        font-family: iconfont;
        src: url(data:application/x-font-ttf;charset=utf-8;base64,AAEAAAALAIAAAwAwT1MvMg9UHRsAAAC8AAAAYGNtYXALnpCVAAABHAAAAOhnYXNwAAAAEAAAAgQAAAAIZ2x5ZoJc3PIAAAIMAAA2rGhlYWQNLpCnAAA4uAAAADZoaGVhB+AEMQAAOPAAAAAkaG10eEtUKx0AADkUAAABWGxvY2HpSdw8AAA6bAAAAK5tYXhwAGMApAAAOxwAAAAgbmFtZa8Wd3IAADs8AAABknBvc3QAAwAAAAA80AAAACAAAwPyAZAABQAAApkCzAAAAI8CmQLMAAAB6wAzAQkAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADEAAAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAAAD//wPA/8AAQAPAAEAAAAABAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAgAAAAAAAGAAAAAwAAADQAAAAEAAAAhAABAAMAAAA0AAEABAAAAIQAAwABAAAANAADAAoAAACEAAQAUAAAABAAEAADAAAAAQAgANciGuZB6Qz//f//AAAAAAAgANciGuYA6QD//f//AAH/4/8t3esaBhdIAAMAAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADAAAAAAAZAAAAAAAAAAHAAAAAAAAAAEAAAABAAAAIAAAACAAAAADAAAA1wAAANcAAAAEAAAiGgAAIhoAAAAFAADmAAAA5kEAAAAGAADpAAAA6QwAAABIAA5gfQAOYH0AAABVAAEAAf//AA8AAQAAAAAAAAAAAAIAADc5AQAAAAABAAAAAAAAAAAAAgAANzkBAAAAAAEAAAAAAAAAAAACAAA3OQEAAAAAAgFNAQ0CtwJ3AAQACQAACQE3AQcjJwEXAQJ3/tY8AS5A7jwBLzv+0gENASo8/tE3PAEuO/7RAAACAOYAzQMaArMABAAJAAABFwcnNyUXAScBASKzO7Q8Abw8/oA8AYAB5rNm3jvNPP5WZgGAAAAAAAQAQAAAA8ADgAAGAAoADgASAAAJAQMjESERASMVMyUjFTMlIxUzAgb++jONA4D9gICAAQCAgAEAgIABAP8AAQACgP2AAYCAgICAgAABAYQBHgJzAmIAFAAAAQ4BBwYmNTwDNTQWJx4BFxYGBwJvKnAmEBs8DSdwKQ0BEAGiHU4ZDRIQHUtOSx0qHwYZTRoNJg0AAAACAPcAtwMNAskABAAJAAAlATcBByEnARcBAs3+KjwB2kD+ZjwB1jz+KrcB1jz+Jjg8AdY8/ioAAAEAgP/tA00DcwBRAAABLgE1LgErASImJyImIyoBIw4BBw4BFQ4BFRQWFw4BFxQWFQ4BFRQWFx4BMzoBMzIWFRYGBw4BFxQWFx4BMzI2Nz4BNz4BNz4BNz4BMzE+AS4BAy0FCBNHOQcYOBwnTSYTHQocLw4PCxMaCAUTEgUHChALDxxaMAUQBRgbBQwTJiMJGhMKEwkdIg4KFQ4TPR0dNhMiUwUhCxQnAvMPDgowEAMJDQkdExQkDxMmFA4bChgpGAoSBAUjGBQeDiILCgkKJRgmWiYdKA4FCDEiDiUTIjMYGDAYKy8VTVtgAAAABACAAEADgANAABMAPABLAHQAAAEiDgIVFB4CMzI+AjU0LgIFNzI2PwE2Mh8BHgEfAR4BDwEOAR8BFgYvASYiDwEGJj8BNCYvASY2MxMiLgI1OgMzFA4CEwcOAR8BFgYvASYiDwEGJj8BPAEvASY2MzcyNj8BNjIfAR4BHwEyFgcCAE+MaD09aIxPT4xoPTxnjf7AJgUGAhAFEwUQAgYFJgoHBx0CBAMGAxIHIwMJBCQJDwIKAQMcCAQK8DJZQiZNd21wRSZCWcsdAgQDBgMSByMDCQQkCQ8CBgMdBwcKJgUGAhAFEwUQAgYFJgoFBQNAPWiMT0+MaD09aIxPT4xoPd0HBAUjCgojAgUCBwITBB0DCAImCgsFEwICEwULCiYFBQMdBxL+QCtHWzAwW0crAacdAwgCJgoLBRMCAhMFCwomBQU format("woff");
        font-weight: 400
      }

      [class*=iconfont] {
        font-family: iconfont !important;
        font-style: normal;
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        -webkit-text-stroke-width: .2px;
        -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-left:before {
        content: "\E626"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-right:before {
        content: "\E621"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-up:before {
        content: "\E611"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-down:before {
        content: "\E61A"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-left-big:before {
        content: "\E628"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-right-big:before {
        content: "\E623"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-up-big:before {
        content: "\E612"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-down-big:before {
        content: "\E61B"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-up-tail:before {
        content: "\E62F"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-down-tail:before {
        content: "\E633"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-down-mini:before {
        content: "\E61C"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-down-small:before {
        content: "\E62B"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-left-thin:before {
        content: "\E629"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-right-thin:before {
        content: "\E624"
      }

      .iconfont-arrow-left-big-thin:before {
        content: "\E627"
      }

        content: "\E622"
      }

        content: "\E908"
      }

      .iconfont-month:before {
        content: "\E901"
      }

      .iconfont-1yuan:before {
        content: "\E903"
      }

  • img文件夹

  • upload文件夹

  • js文件夹

  • lib文件夹

    • reset.css

      /* reset */
      html,
      body,
      h1,
      h2,
      h3,
      h4,
      h5,
      h6,
      div,
      dl,
      dt,
      dd,
      ul,
      ol,
      li,
      p,
      blockquote,
      pre,
      hr,
      figure,
      table,
      caption,
      th,
      td,
      form,
      fieldset,
      legend,
      input,
      button,
      textarea,
      menu {
          margin: 0;
          padding: 0;
      }

      header,
      footer,
      section,
      article,
      aside,
      nav,
      hgroup,
      address,
      figure,
      figcaption,
      menu,
      details {
          display: block;
      }

      table {
          border-collapse: collapse;
          border-spacing: 0;
      }

      caption,
      th {
          text-align: left;
          font-weight: normal;
      }

      html,
      body,
      fieldset,
      img,
      iframe,
      abbr {
          border: 0;
      }

      i,
      cite,
      em,
      var,
      address,
      dfn {
          font-style: normal;
      }

      [hidefocus],
      summary {
          outline: 0;
      }

      li {
          list-style: none;
      }

      h1,
      h2,
      h3,
      h4,
      h5,
      h6,
      small {
          font-size: 100%;
      }

      sup,
      sub {
          font-size: 83%;
      }

      pre,
      code,
      kbd,
      samp {
          font-family: inherit;
      }

      q:before,
      q:after {
          content: none;
      }

      textarea {
          overflow: auto;
          resize: none;
      }

      label,
      summary {
          cursor: default;
      }

      a,
      button {
          cursor: pointer;
      }

      h1,
      h2,
      h3,
      h4,
      h5,
      h6,
      em,
      strong,
      b {
          font-weight: bold;
      }

      del,
      ins,
      u,
      s,
      a,
      a:hover {
          text-decoration: none;
      }

      body,
      textarea,
      input,
      button,
      select,
      keygen,
      legend {
          font: 12px/1.14 arial, "Microsoft YaHei";
          color: #333;
          outline: 0;
      }

      body {
          background: #fff;
      }

      a,
      a:hover {
          color: #333;
      }

  • fonts文件夹 .ttf .svg .eot .woff .woff2

引入第三方库​

  • 浏览器默认样式

项目中的css​

  • 先引入重置样式
  • 再引入公共样式
  • 再引入页面样式

box-sizeing 盒子尺寸​

  • 作用: 当给盒子重新添加padding border的时候 重新计算盒子的宽和高

  • 应用场景: * {box-sizing: border-box}

  • 属性:box-sizing

  • content-box(默认值)

  • border-box(只要用box-sizing)

focus只能给input用
